patches.summary: Redirect syncResource NDJSON events to stderr during workflow archive --json so stdout is a single parseable JSON document.
patches.reason: Generated syncResource writes per-event NDJSON to os.Stdout; workflow archive --json then appended a final summary object on the same stream, producing dual-format output that neither json.Unmarshal nor a strict NDJSON parser accepts. Patched locally so users piping `--json` into jq get clean JSON; NDJSON progress events still surface on stderr.
patches.validated_outcome: After fix, `workflow archive --json > out.txt` produces a 4-key JSON object parseable by python json.load; 47 NDJSON event lines land on stderr.
patches.upstream_issue: Generator-level fix needed: syncResource should route events through a writer that switches to stderr when --json is set. Filed as retro candidate for cli-printing-press.

patches.summary: Add rows.Err() inspection after every for rows.Next() loop in the 9 novel commands so mid-iteration SQLite errors fail loudly instead of returning truncated results with exit 0.
patches.reason: Greptile P2 (initial wave) and P1 (companies_profile.go follow-up) findings on PR #694: without rows.Err() the loop exit is indistinguishable from successful completion when SQLite interrupts (corrupted WAL page, storage error, context cancellation), and commands return partial results with no signal.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... still passes; eleven rows.Err() checks present across the nine files (whats_new.go has two loops; companies_profile.go has two helper functions).

patches.summary: Remove unused `stages` and `sectors` map allocations in analytics_funding_by_sector.go.
patches.reason: Greptile P2 finding on PR #694: the maps were populated inside the aggregation loop but never read; the final output is built entirely from the `cells` map and splitOnce, so the two maps only burned allocations and added reader noise.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... still passes; analytics funding-by-sector output is unchanged.
